mapper.select: SELECT PRS_ID ,APP_ID ,PRS_PWD ,PRS_NAME ,PRS_EMAIL ,PRS_HOMEPAGE ,PRS_USE_YN ,PRS_TYPE ,PRS_AUTH ,PRS_AUTH_YN ,APP_APPLY_YN ,APP_ISSUED_YN ,APP_AUTH_KEY ,ORIG_FILE_NM ,STORED_FILE_NM FROM WH_PRESS WHERE 1=1 AND PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID} AND PRS_PWD = CONCAT('*',UPPER(SHA1(UNHEX(SHA1(#{PRS_PWD}))))) AND PRS_USE_YN = 'Y'
